problem.title: CT-ICP paper-comparable on KITTI Odometry 07 (full, 1101 frames)
problem.question: Does CT-ICP reach the paper-reported RPE 0.30% on KITTI Odometry 07 in default pure-odometry mode? How much does --ct-icp-gt-seed change it?

variants.label: Default (paper-comparable pure odometry)
variants.intent: CT-ICP default = pure odometry. This is the directly paper-comparable variant.
variants.note: Anchor matches first GT pose; subsequent frames rely on CT-ICP's own continuous-time motion prior (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: GT-seeded TrajectoryFrame init (Policy A reference)
variants.intent: Symmetric Policy A reference — non-comparable to paper, kept to quantify the GT-seed advantage.
variants.note: Seeds CT-ICP TrajectoryFrame with GT begin/end pose per scan. Symmetric of the GT-seeded Policy A path for dogfooding-style fair-prior comparison.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.
